texto: It's not the substance of what you make known to me that's beautiful
autor: it's the opening of your heart. It is the 'yes' in your heart to be mine. The fact that you are revealing the secrets and letting me peer into your heart--that is in itself the beautiful part.
explicacao: Citação de it's the opening of your heart. It is the 'yes' in your heart to be mine. The fact that you are revealing the secrets and letting me peer into your heart--that is in itself the beautiful part. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It's not the substance of what you make known to me that's beautiful” articula reflexao, dana-candler, substance em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
